name: CE Pipeline
description: Tier 1 CE practice pipeline. All customer opportunities flow through this project from Awareness → Pre-Sales → POC → Closed. One task per opportunity. Tasks are created via /pm:new-opportunity and carry all 17 GCA_GTM_ custom fields for unified reporting.

required_custom_fields.note: After creating this project, attach all 17 GCA_GTM_ fields via Asana UI: Project → Customize → Fields → Add Field. These fields drive Goal reporting and the pm:new-opportunity workflow.

sections.name: 🎤 Awareness Sessions
sections.description: Incoming awareness session requests. Tasks created via /pm:new-opportunity Awareness. GCA_GTM_Stage=Awareness.

sections.name: 🔍 Pre-Sales
sections.description: Active pre-sales engagements. Tasks created via /pm:new-opportunity Pre-Sales. GCA_GTM_Stage=Pre-Sales. ARR Potential and Vector URL required within Day 1.

sections.name: 🧪 POC — Active
sections.description: Confirmed POCs in progress. Stage updated from Pre-Sales when customer confirms. Triggers Rule 4: auto-create Tier 2 customer project from template.

sections.name: ✅ Closed-Won
sections.description: Opportunities converted to paying customers. GCA_GTM_Outcome=Closed-Won. Customer project exists in Tier 2.

sections.name: ❌ Closed-Lost
sections.description: Opportunities lost to competitor or budget. GCA_GTM_Outcome=Closed-Lost. Post-mortem notes should be captured in the task.

sections.name: 💤 No Interest
sections.description: Prospects who declined or went dark. GCA_GTM_Outcome=No Interest. GCA_GTM_Risk Flag=Going Cold auto-set after 10 days of inactivity.

sections.name: 🗄️ Archive
sections.description: Completed, stale, or de-prioritised opportunities. Move here for historical record-keeping.
